subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Accept this helpless handmaiden in Thy Kingdom and make her the recipient of Thine everlasting bounty. Give her to drink from the cup of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند اين کنيز مستمند را در ملکوت خويش قبول نما و بفيض ابدی محظوظ فرما جام عشق بنوشان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Nineteen-Day Feast
